heading: The Tour
body: NSGBillz is taking his artist roster on a 4-city tour across Texas and Arkansas. Headlined by SSG Splurge with support from 10K Caash, Nikeboymeech, and special appearances by JohnnyDamnD. This isn't a showcase — it's a movement. Dallas hip-hop hitting Arkansas, Austin, and Houston with professional production, live streaming, and content capture at every stop.

heading: The Route
body:
1. Arkansas - SSG Splurge hometown headliner (venue TBD)
2. Dallas - Creators Dont Die OR Royal Lane Studios (2-for-1 deal in play)
3. Austin - Target venue: Sapien Center or Ana Gabriela/Berah Agency
4. Houston - Market test (demand dependent)

heading: Why Now
body: Confirmed interest: Arkansas and Dallas venues ready to book. Proven artists: SSG Splurge has Arkansas/Dallas demand, SoundCloud traction. Venue partnerships: Creators Dont Die (Meka Jackson) offering '2 for 1' Dallas deal. Content engine: Every show streams live + cut into viral clips. Revenue ready: Ticket sales, merch, live stream tips, post-show content monetization.

heading: The Ask
body: Raising $50,000 to fund: Venue deposits & rentals ($15K), Production - sound, lights, stage ($12K), Artist guarantees ($10K), Travel & lodging ($6K), Marketing & promo ($4K), Videography & content ($3K). Investor Return: 10% equity pool gets revenue share from ticket sales, merch, streaming revenue, and content monetization. Open books — every dollar tracked publicly on this page.

heading: Revenue Model
body: Ticket Sales: $20-30/ticket × 150-200 attendees/show = $12K-24K potential. Merch Sales: T-shirts, hoodies, posters = $3K-5K potential. Live Stream Tips: YouTube/Twitch/IG streaming = $500-1K potential. Content Monetization: Post-tour documentary, viral clips = $2K-5K backend. Sponsorships: Local brands, drink sponsors = $2K-5K potential. Total Potential Revenue: $19.5K - $40K. Break-even at $50K, profit distributed to equity holders.

heading: Why This Works
body: De-risks NSGBillz - No personal capital at risk. Pays artists upfront - Guarantees regardless of ticket sales. Professional production - Venues see serious operation. Content goldmine - 4 shows = 12-20 viral clips + documentary. Investor upside - Equity in touring model (not just this tour). Proves the model - Blueprint for future artist tours on the platform. Open books - Every dollar tracked publicly.
